app.title: KERN Local Drafting Workspace
app.description: KERN drafts German business replies from local company documents.
status.onboarding_ready: Confirm the local setup, then start with one grounded German draft.
empty.heading: Ready to Help.
empty.lead: Load a local document, ask a grounded question, and let KERN turn the answer into a usable German business reply.
empty.lead_workflow: Start with one local document, then let KERN turn grounded facts into a concise German reply you can review before sending.
empty.lead_sample: Use the sample workspace to review local sources, trace the grounded answer, and see the draft path before switching to real company documents.
empty.starters_lead: These prompts keep KERN grounded in local documents and business writing instead of the broader utility surface.
empty.draft_desc: Turn grounded facts into a German business reply
empty.summarize_desc: Pull the main points, risks, and next actions
empty.compare_desc: Review what changed across local versions
empty.next_action_desc: Turn a local document into a usable email draft
prompts.focus: Summarize my current priorities for today
prompts.documents: Search my documents for contracts and invoices
prompts.reminder: Create a reminder for me to review my next deadline tomorrow morning
prompts.governance: Give me a summary of runtime and governance status
prompts.draft_reply: Use my local documents and draft a short German reply to a customer. Cite the relevant facts first.
prompts.summarize_document: Summarize my latest local document and list the most important risks, dates, and open points.
prompts.compare_versions: Compare my two newest local documents and explain the most important differences for a business decision.
prompts.next_action_mail: Read my local document and draft a short formal German email with a clear next step.
composer.placeholder: Ask from local documents or draft a grounded German business reply
composer.upload_file_desc: Add a local document for grounded drafting
composer.transcribe_desc: Convert an audio file to text in the composer
composer.production_gated: Real documents stay local in this profile. The sample workspace is still available if you want a dry run first.
composer.upload_prompt: I've just uploaded ${label} to the knowledge base. Please confirm it was indexed and summarize what it contains.
composer.upload_offline: ${label} indexed but KERN is offline - reconnect to continue.
onboarding.default_title: Get to your first grounded draft
onboarding.default_body: Confirm local storage, confirm the recommended model path, then start with one document-grounded reply.
onboarding.optimistic_model_title: Confirm the recommended local model path
onboarding.optimistic_model_body: KERN uses one local model path for drafting, summarization, and grounded answers. Keep that path fixed for pilot users.
onboarding.optimistic_workflow_title: Start with a document-grounded German reply
onboarding.optimistic_workflow_body_uplo: Upload one local document, then let KERN draft a concise German business response from that material.
onboarding.optimistic_workflow_body_read: Use one local document to draft a concise German business response and review the cited basis before sending.
onboarding.optimistic_sample_body: These bundled documents show the local drafting workflow without using company files. Everything in this workspace is marked as sample content.
onboarding.optimistic_sample_primary: Switch to my own local documents
onboarding.recovery_default: Encrypted backups stay on this machine.
onboarding.readiness_default: Ready for the first grounded draft.
onboarding.upload_ready: Upload a local document first. KERN will keep it in this profile and use it for the first draft.
onboarding.workflow_started: KERN is starting the first grounded drafting workflow.
onboarding.workflow_staged: The first drafting prompt is ready in the composer.
onboarding.workflow_ready: The first drafting prompt is ready. Review it and send when you want.
onboarding.dismissed: First-run guidance hidden. The drafting workflow stays available from the main screen.
onboarding.workflow_prompt_one: Use the local document "${title}". First list the relevant facts from it, then draft a short formal German business reply.
onboarding.workflow_prompt_none: I want to draft a formal German business reply from one local document. Tell me what to upload first and then draft from it.
upload.card_success_meta: ${indexed} of ${total} file(s) indexed into this profile
upload.success_body: KERN stored the upload inside the active profile and can summarize it or answer grounded questions now.
upload.success_body_indexed: The upload is indexed locally. Summarize it or ask grounded questions when you're ready.
upload.success_body_offline: The upload was indexed locally. Start or reconnect the model to summarize or ask grounded questions.
upload.bulk_success_body: The files are indexed locally. You can summarize them, ask questions, or compare the latest batch from here.
upload.duplicate_body: KERN recognized these files as duplicates and kept the existing indexed copies in the active profile.
upload.mixed_body: KERN accepted part of the batch. Review duplicates or rejected files below before continuing with the indexed documents.
upload.ocr_warning: ${count} PDF file(s) may need OCR review because text extraction looked weak.
upload.card_cancelled_meta: No file was added to the profile
upload.cancelled_body: Nothing was indexed. You can reopen the picker when you are ready.
upload.card_error_meta: KERN could not finish this document step
upload.error_body: Check the file type, file size, and connection to the local service, then try again.
upload.error_unreadable_pdf_title: This PDF could not be read
upload.error_unreadable_pdf_body: KERN could not extract readable text from this PDF on this machine. Try a text-based PDF or review OCR support.
upload.error_failed_item_title: This file could not be added
failures.default_message: A local step needs review before KERN can continue with the pilot workflow.
failures.document_ingest_title: Some documents could not be indexed
failures.document_ingest_summary: KERN could not extract usable text from one or more dropped files. The rest of your workspace is still available.
failures.document_ingest_summary_many: KERN could not extract usable text from ${count} dropped files. The rest of your workspace is still available.
failures.upload_summary: KERN could not accept one or more files in this batch. Review the file types, sizes, or duplicate entries below.
failures.model_runtime_summary: KERN could not reach the configured local model path or runtime service.
failures.support_bundle_summary: KERN could not package the support bundle on the last attempt.
failures.recovery_summary: KERN hit an issue during backup, restore, or update work. Your local data is still preserved unless you explicitly remove it.
upload.followup_sent: KERN is working on the uploaded document(s) now.
upload.followup_staged: KERN is offline, so the prompt was staged in the composer instead.
upload.item_indexed_detail: Indexed into the active local profile.
upload.item_ocr_detail: Indexed locally, but the extracted text may need OCR review.
upload.summary_one: Summarize the document "${title}". Focus on the main points, risks, and next actions.
upload.summary_many: Summarize the ${count} uploaded documents. Focus on the main themes, differences, and next actions.
upload.summary_fallback: Summarize the latest uploaded document and focus on key points, risks, and next actions.
upload.ask_one: What are the key takeaways and open questions in "${title}"?
upload.ask_many: What are the main takeaways and open questions across the ${count} uploaded documents?
upload.ask_fallback: What are the key takeaways and open questions in the latest uploaded document?
upload.compare_prompt: Compare the newly uploaded documents and highlight the important similarities, differences, and risks.
upload.compare_sent: KERN is comparing the latest uploaded documents.
upload.compare_offline: KERN is offline, so document comparison could not start.
dropzone.ready_body: Drop files here to add them to this workspace.
dropzone.blocked_title: Production upload is locked for now
dropzone.blocked_body: The sample workspace stays available locally. Import a valid offline license before dropping real company documents here.
dropzone.uploading_body: KERN is adding ${count} file(s) to this workspace.
dropzone.success_body: ${count} file(s) were added to this workspace.
dropzone.error_body: Check the files and try the drop again.
dropzone.formats: PDF, DOCX, XLSX, TXT, CSV, EML, HTML
dropzone.success_assist: ${count} file(s) added locally. Ask a grounded question or draft the next reply when you are ready.
upload_notice.title: KERN will index this document locally.
upload_notice.lead: KERN stores the file in the active profile, extracts text, and uses the local model to answer or summarize from that text.
upload_notice.extraction_text: Scanned or image-only PDFs may produce weak summaries because KERN currently relies on text extraction, not OCR.
upload_notice.privacy_text: The upload and summarization path stays local inside your KERN profile. No cloud inference is required.
upload_notice.dismiss: Don't show this again for this profile
upload_notice.dismissed_info: Upload was canceled before anything was added locally.
search.no_match: No matching messages in this conversation.
knowledge.title: Knowledge
knowledge.prompt_search_detail: Use this panel to search indexed documents, memory, and archives without leaving the current profile.
knowledge.no_results_detail: Nothing matched the current query. Try a broader term, a document title, or fewer keywords.
brief.title: Brief
brief.default_focus: Ask for a workspace summary to populate this panel.
proactive.quiet: KERN stays quiet until a local signal matters.
kg.title: Knowledge Graph
kg.empty: No graph data loaded. Click Build to extract entities from documents.
kg.no_entities: No entities in the knowledge graph yet. Click Build to extract from documents.
memory.title: Conversation Memory
docs.title: Documents
docs.empty_detail: Upload PDFs, text files, or office documents here and KERN will index them into the active profile for grounded answers.
docs.compare_prompt: What should KERN compare across the selected documents?
docs.compare_default_query: Compare the key similarities and differences.
meetings.title: Meetings
network.title: Network isolation
network.monitoring: Monitoring KERN process for unexpected outbound connections.
audit.title: Activity log
audit.no_events_filter: No audit events match that category.
schedules.title: Scheduled tasks
schedules.no_tasks: No scheduled tasks. Add one to get started.
schedules.empty_detail: Create a recurring summary, report, or reminder here when you want KERN to take routine local actions.
settings.title: Settings
settings.theme_note_locked: ${active} mode is locked in until you switch it again.
settings.support_bundle_ready: Support bundle is ready. Send the zip file, not raw company documents.
settings.data_lifecycle_note: KERN keeps profile data and backups on this machine. Default uninstall removes runtime files and preserves profile data unless you explicitly remove it.
settings.model_story_initial_body: KERN is verifying the current model path and privacy posture for this session.
settings.model_story_ready_title: KERN is using a local-only model path
settings.model_story_ready_body: Drafting, summarization, and document answers stay inside this deployment. If the local model disappears, KERN will not fall back to cloud inference.
settings.model_story_warning_body: KERN is still keeping data local. Start the local model server to restore drafting, summarization, and grounded answers.
settings.model_fact_cloud_enabled: Cloud path is configured and may be available outside strict local mode.
settings.model_fact_cloud_disabled: Cloud fallback is disabled for the current setup.
settings.model_fact_isolated: Network monitor currently reports an isolated local posture.
settings.model_fact_local_endpoint: KERN is expected to use a local endpoint instead of a hosted provider.
settings.model_fact_fail_closed: If the model is unavailable, KERN leaves LLM features unavailable instead of silently switching providers.
actions.unlock_required: Unlock the active profile to use workspace actions.
misc.export_logs_disabled: Unlock the active profile before exporting logs.
sync.local_only_meta: No sync or remote export targets configured.
empty.no_documents: No documents ingested yet — drag files here to start.
empty.no_schedules: No scheduled tasks — create one from the Schedules tab.
empty.no_knowledge_graph: No knowledge graph data — ingest documents to build the graph.
capabilities.empty_detail: Once KERN finishes loading the local tool registry, available actions will appear here.
upload.validation.empty: Empty or invalid file detected. Folders cannot be uploaded.
onboarding.activation_default: The sample workspace is available immediately, and this local install can also work with real company documents right away.
onboarding.sample_prompt: Use the sample workspace documents. First list the relevant facts from the local sample files, then draft a short formal German business reply and cite the supporting material.
onboarding.sample_started: Sample workspace is ready for evaluation.
onboarding.sample_prompt_ready: Sample drafting prompt staged in the composer.
onboarding.sample_exit: Switched back to the real local-document path.
settings.license_active_title: Offline license is active for this install.
settings.license_optional_title: Offline licensing is optional for this local install.
settings.license_default_body: KERN runs locally on this machine whether or not an offline license file is installed. Import one only if this pilot package uses commercial licensing or support tracking.
settings.license_import_failed: KERN could not import the offline license file.
settings.update_default_title: Pilot updates stay manual and stable-only.
settings.update_default_body: KERN records the last backup and restore attempt so operators can confirm rollback state before changing the install.
